entity.label: Matthat
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Levi, and father of Heli (Luke 3:24).

nodes.label: Matthat
nodes.description: The son of Levi, and father of Heli (Luke 3:24).

nodes.label: Heli
nodes.description: Elevation, father of Joseph in the line of our Lord’s ancestry (Luke 3:23).

verses.text: Which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi, which was the son of Melchi, which was the son of Janna, which was the son of Joseph,
